summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Iteration 8 - Bug Fixes. All 22 backend tests passed (100%). All 6 bug fixes verified working correctly through both API and UI testing.

issues: Default date filter (last 30 days) hides older accounts including closed ones - users need to expand date range to see all accounts

passed_tests: Bug 1: Permission update uses matched_count - API returns 200 even when no changes made
Bug 1: Admin can update user permissions via PUT /api/users/{id}/permissions
Bug 1: Permission changes reflect when user re-fetches /api/auth/me
Bug 2: Viewer1 (view-only) - Add Account button hidden on Dashboard
Bug 2: Viewer1 (view-only) - Add Account button hidden on Accounts page
Bug 2: Viewer1 (view-only) - Edit/Delete buttons hidden in accounts table, only View visible
Bug 2: Operator1 - Delete button hidden (no delete permission), Edit visible (has update permission)
Bug 3: Operator1 sidebar shows Dashboard, Accounts, Reports but NOT Users
Bug 3: Viewer1 sidebar shows Dashboard, Accounts, Reports but NOT Users
Bug 4: Village filter is SearchableDropdown with search input inside dropdown
Bug 4: Villages endpoint returns list of unique villages
Bug 5: Closed account GET detail shows user_can_edit=false, user_can_delete=false
Bug 5: Closed account PUT update returns 403
Bug 5: Closed account DELETE returns 403
Bug 5: Closed account POST add landed entry returns 403
Bug 5: Reopen account requires reason (400 if empty)
Bug 5: After reopen, edit works again
Bug 5: UI - Closed accounts only show View button (no Edit/Delete)
Bug 5: UI - Closed account detail shows 'Account Closed' banner with Reopen button
Bug 6: Dashboard summary returns active totals (total_landed_amount, etc.)
Bug 6: Dashboard summary returns closed totals (closed_total_landed_amount, etc.)
Bug 6: Dashboard stats returns total_accounts, active_accounts, closed_accounts
Bug 6: UI - Dashboard shows separate 'Active Accounts' and 'Closed Accounts' sections
Bug 7: DateRangePicker shows dual-month calendar
Bug 7: DateRangePicker has preset buttons (7d, 30d, 90d, 1y)
Bug 7: DateRangePicker default shows last 30 days range
Auth: Admin login works
Auth: Operator1 login works
Auth: Viewer1 login works
Auth: /api/auth/me returns user with permissions

bug_1_permissions_reflecting.details: Backend uses matched_count instead of modified_count. AuthContext.refreshUser() called on route change.

bug_2_button_visibility.details: Add/Edit/Delete buttons correctly hidden based on user permissions. Viewer sees only View button.

bug_3_sidebar_nav.details: filteredNav correctly filters navigation items. Non-admins don't see Users nav.

bug_4_village_dropdown.details: SearchableDropdown component with search input inside dropdown. Villages endpoint returns unique villages.

bug_5_closed_accounts.details: Backend returns 403 for update/delete/add on closed accounts. UI hides Edit/Delete buttons. Reopen requires reason.

bug_6_dashboard_separation.details: Dashboard summary returns both active and closed totals. UI shows separate sections.

bug_7_date_range_picker.details: DateRangePicker with dual-month calendar and preset buttons (7d, 30d, 90d, 1y).

critical_code_review_comments: Permission checks properly implemented in both backend and frontend
Closed account restrictions working at both API and UI level
Dashboard correctly separates active vs closed account totals
SearchableDropdown and DateRangePicker components working as expected
seed_data_creation: Backend tests created 6 TEST_ClosedAccountTest accounts for testing closed account restrictions
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 6 bug fixes from iteration 8 verified working. Test credentials: admin/admin123, operator1/operator123, viewer1/viewer123. operator1 ID: 69bebd76b09bf615fb3f0790, viewer1 ID: 69bebd76b09bf615fb3f0791. Default date filter is 30 days - expand to 1 year to see all accounts including closed ones. 8 closed accounts exist in the system.
